rule_metadata.name: SuicideScriptL1
rule_metadata.author: Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com

rules.rule_text:
rule SuicideScriptL1
{
	meta:
		copyright = "2015 Novetta Solutions"
		author = "Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com"

	strings:
		$ = ":L1\ndel \"%s\"\nif exist \"%s\" goto L1\ndel \"%s\"\n"

	condition:
		any of them
}

rule_metadata.name: SuicideScriptR1_Multi
rule_metadata.author: Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com

rules.rule_text:
rule SuicideScriptR1_Multi
{
	meta:
		copyright = "2015 Novetta Solutions"
		author = "Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com"

	strings:
		$ = "\" goto R1\ndel /a \""
		$ = "\"\nif exist \""
		$ = "@echo off\n:R1\ndel /a \""

	condition:
		all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: SuicideScriptR
rule_metadata.author: Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com

rules.rule_text:
rule SuicideScriptR
{
	meta:
		copyright = "2015 Novetta Solutions"
		author = "Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group - trig@novetta.com"

	strings:
		$ = ":R\nIF NOT EXIST %s GOTO E\ndel /a %s\nGOTO R\n:E\ndel /a d.bat"

	condition:
		all of them
}
